aboutUs.title: About Gurudev Market
aboutUs.description: Gurudev Market is a new commercial hub near the highway. We offer flexible shops, high visibility, and many amenities for entrepreneurs. Join our vibrant community of businesses and customers!
aboutUs.vision_text: Empowering local businesses and creating a thriving marketplace for all.
aboutUs.mission_text: To provide modern, accessible, and well-equipped shops for entrepreneurs and customers.
aboutUs.owner1_desc: Devendra is passionate about growing local businesses.
aboutUs.owner2_desc: Shailendra has years of experience in commercial real estate.
aboutUs.owner3_desc: Vishnu is dedicated to customer satisfaction and community building.

ContactUs.contact_owner_note: You may call or email us for urgent queries or fill the booking form alongside.
ContactUs.purpose_open_shop: Purpose (What shop do you want to open?)
ContactUs.thank_you_enquiry: Thank you! Your enquiry was sent.

landingPage.modern_shop_desc: Modern shop spaces on highway for rent. Reserve your place in a growing marketplace.
landingPage.clean_facilities_desc: Well-maintained washrooms and 24/7 clean drinking water for all tenants and customers.
landingPage.prime_location_desc: On the main highway near Depalpur, connecting rural commerce to major cities.
landingPage.tagline: Your Gateway to Growing Business on the Highway!
landingPage.about_market_desc: Gurudev Market is a new commercial destination on the highway near Depalpur. We offer flexible shop spaces for entrepreneurs, with high visibility and a range of facilities. Join a vibrant community of businesses and customers!
landingPage.contact_today: Contact us today or fill out our booking form below to secure your space.
landingPage.footer_address: Gurudev Market, Jalodiya Panth Betma Road, Depalpur

contactForm.contact_owner_note: You may call or email us for urgent queries or fill the booking form alongside.
contactForm.purpose: Purpose (What shop do you want to open?)
contactForm.success_message: Your enquiry has been sent successfully!
contactForm.error_message: There was an error. Please try again.
